0.response: {"Q0":"Yes, i would not mine any other planets during the green crystal only stage so i would get the most almost of blue crystals. Because mining obviously costs gold so i would stick to only mining the blue planet, if that makes sense. "}

7.response: {"Q0":"Just seeing what i had a higher chance of winning. "}

9.response: {"Q0":"The only thing that wasn't clear was the gold amount. In the trials i made more money with a lower amount of gold then in the real game which is confusing."}

1.response: {"Q0":"I just kept mining the blue planets to get the most gold. "}

5.response: {"Q0":"Sometimes yes for the green gems if i wasn't getting the blue planet as often so i could get a chance at getting a blue gem from crystal. "}

2.response: {"Q0":"I would say it was a 50/50 sometimes i would get the stone or the gems."}

6.response: {"Q0":"No. I only would gather the blue and green gems. "}

8.response: {"Q0":"I was definitely focused on the planets more for the gold. I thought the more gold i had would equal the more i would make but i didn't make as much as i thought."}

3.response: {"Q0":"Yes, i was pretty easy to remember."}

4.response: {"Q0":"Yes, maybe it easy to make my next plan/strat."}
